name: Priority Queue Design — Lazy Deletion, Custom Comparators

metadata.career_relevance: Task Scheduler (LeetCode #621) and Reorganize String are Google/Amazon interview staples. Lazy deletion (mark-and-skip) solves heap problems where elements become invalid but can't be efficiently removed.

hook.what_you_will_build: Priority Queue Design — Lazy Deletion, Custom Comparators

key_takeaways: Lazy deletion: mark elements as removed in HashMap; skip on poll
Task Scheduler: count frequencies; (maxFreq-1)*(n+1)+maxCount vs tasks.length
Reorganize String: always pick highest-frequency char not equal to last placed
Furthest Building: use min-heap for ladders — replace with bricks when possible
K Pairs Smallest Sums: min-heap starting with (nums1[i], nums2[0]) pairs
